keyEvents.text: Goal! Spain 1, Belgium 0. Fabián Ruiz (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal.
Goal! Spain 1, Belgium 1. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Timothy Castagne with a cross.
Pau Cubarsí (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Spain. Pedri replaces Fabián Ruiz.
Substitution, Belgium. Romelu Lukaku replaces Hans Vanaken.
Substitution, Belgium. Axel Witsel replaces Leandro Trossard.
Substitution, Belgium. Joaquin Seys replaces Maxim De Cuyper.
Substitution, Belgium. Senne Lammens replaces Thibaut Courtois because of an injury.
Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.
Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Belgium. Alexis Saelemaekers replaces Kevin De Bruyne.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.
Goal! Spain 2, Belgium 1. Mikel Merino (Spain) left footed shot from very close range to the top left corner.
Aymeric Laporte (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Axel Witsel (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
